summary: Architecture Profiles are reviewable before baseline confirmation: architecture profiles --json exposes built-in and project profile validity, suitable use cases, sources, principles, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy; tests cover built-in and project profiles.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'architecture profiles|project architecture profiles'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'architecture profiles|project architecture profiles'

reviewability: Run architecture profiles and targeted tests, then inspect the profile implementation and build-vs-buy decision.
limitations: This validates the current built-in/project profile model; richer external registries would need a new build-vs-buy decision.
